title: Dynamic Flight Control
description: This Mod Let's you fly With different game method, so you don't have use shift and space. You can fly up and down, just by pointing towards it.
body:
Here You have **Dynamic Flight Control mod**, which changes the way you fly in minecraft. Usually when you fly in minecraft, You have to press space and shift to move up and down. But With this mod, You get an alternate way. With the dynamic Flight mod, You can fly up and down, just by looking at the directions.

It's just like how you fly in elytra. But here You get more control, as you can You use shift and space along with dynamic movements. You don't have to do anything after you installed this mod. Just fly and you will observe the dynamicness by yourself.

## Features

- **Directional Flight** — Your view direction controls vertical movement. No more mashing Space/Shift.
- **Double-Tap Toggle** — Double-tap Space to activate/deactivate flight.
- **Full Movement** — WASD for horizontal, Space/Shift for vertical override, all combined with look direction.
- **Adjustable Speed** — `/flightspeed <0.1-2.0>` to set your preferred flight speed.
- **Ground Lock** — `/flightgroundlock <true|false>` controls whether landing exits flight.
- **Reset** — `/flightreset` restores all settings to default.

## How to Use

1. Install the mod
2. Enter Creative mode (or have `mayfly` ability)
3. Double-tap Space to start flying
4. Look where you want to go — you'll fly in that direction
5. Double-tap Space again to stop
